mapper.select: SELECT * FROM scenic_spot WHERE spot_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{spotName}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scenic_spot(spot_name, max_capacity, total_parking, address, longitude, latitude, map_url) VALUES(#{spotName}, #{maxCapacity}, #{totalParking}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{mapUrl})
INSERT INTO scenic_manager(spot_id, work_no, manager_name, phone, post) VALUES(#{spotId}, #{workNo}, #{managerName}, #{phone}, #{post})
INSERT INTO scenic_emergency(spot_id, rescuer_name, rescuer_phone, vehicle_no) VALUES(#{spotId}, #{rescuerName}, #{rescuerPhone}, #{vehicleNo})
